title: The Latest Login in 2020
description: Find the latest login for each user in year 2020.
constraints: The table contains logins from multiple years — filter to 2020 only
Each returned user must have logged in at least once in 2020
key_concept: MAX() GROUP BY with date filter.

hints.L1: Filter to 2020, group by user_id, take MAX(time_stamp).
hints.L2: SELECT user_id, MAX(time_stamp) AS last_stamp FROM Logins WHERE YEAR(time_stamp) = 2020 GROUP BY user_id
hints.L3: SELECT user_id, MAX(time_stamp) AS last_stamp FROM Logins WHERE YEAR(time_stamp) = 2020 GROUP BY user_id

optimal_solution: SELECT user_id, MAX(time_stamp) AS last_stamp FROM Logins WHERE YEAR(time_stamp) = 2020 GROUP BY user_id;
